displayName: Chinese input method support for NVDA
description:
This add-on provides Chinese input method support for the NVDA screen reader.
It enhances the Chinese input experience in terms of input habits and efficiency for NVDA users.
changelog:
### 2026.6.28

* Improved reliability when selecting IME candidates with number keys.
* Fixed some missed or delayed speech in fast IME input scenarios.
* Reduced unnecessary debug log noise during normal typing.

translations.description:
该插件为 NVDA 屏幕阅读器提供中文输入法朗读支持。
从输入习惯和效率方面增强了 NVDA 用户的中文输入体验。
translations.changelog:
### 2026.6.28

* 改进使用数字键选择输入法候选项时的可靠性。
* 修复快速输入时可能漏读或延迟朗读的问题。
* 减少正常输入时不必要的调试日志。
